name: Chicken Enchilada Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz. package of frozen corn kernels, thawed slightly
1 container (8 oz.) low fat plain yogurt
1 can (16 oz.) black beans, rinsed and drained
8 ounces cooked chicken, torn into shreds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly oil a 13 x 9 inch baking dish.
3. Sprinkle half of the corn kernels in the prepared dish.
4. Tear tortillas into pieces and arrange them overlapping on top of the corn.
5. Mix salsa and tomatoes in a bowl. In another bowl, stir together yogurt, milk and salt.
6. Spoon one cup of salsa mixture over the tortillas.
7. Drizzle with half of the yogurt mixture and sprinkle with olives.
8. Reserve some corn and beans for later use. Sprinkle reserved ingredients over the casserole along with chicken, green onion, and cilantro.
9. Sprinkle remaining salt, pepper, cumin, and oregano on top.
10. Sprinkle half of the cheddar cheese and spoon one cup of salsa mixture over the top.
11. Tear remaining tortillas into pieces and overlap them to cover the dish.
12. Sprinkle reserved corn and beans on top. Spoon remaining salsa mixture over the dish.
13. Drizzle with remaining yogurt mixture and sprinkle with remaining cheddar cheese.
14. Bake, covered in 350 degree oven for 15 minutes. Uncover and bake an additional 10 minutes or until hot and lightly browned. Serve with sour cream and radish slices if desired.
